changes_required_for_requested_stack: keep RFC 7232 and RFC 7233 inside the certification boundary with maintained local conformance vectors and release-gate alignment
add explicit RFC 9111 policy and test coverage only if cache freshness / revalidation behavior becomes a deliberate product boundary
add RFC 9530 digest field generation and verification for content and representation digests only if integrity fields become product requirements
add a dedicated HTTP Message Signatures component for RFC 9421 only if signed HTTP request/response handling becomes a declared product goal
if JOSE or COSE is desired, add a dedicated auth / crypto boundary rather than folding those features into the current direct-server certification boundary
extend machine-readable certification manifests, release gates, and evidence bundles before any broader cache / integrity / signature RFC is newly claimed

accept_encoding.notes: Accept-Encoding parsing and qvalue selection are implemented for the package-owned response coding path.

content_encoding.notes: gzip, deflate, and optional br are emitted when the response qualifies for content coding.

vary.notes: Vary: accept-encoding is emitted on the content-coding path.

etag.notes: Entity tags are generated for package-owned response entity handling and used by the conditional engine.

if_none_match.notes: If-None-Match drives 304 / 412 outcomes through the conditional request engine.

if_match.notes: If-Match is evaluated against the generated or supplied current entity tag.

if_modified_since.notes: If-Modified-Since is evaluated against Last-Modified when present.

if_unmodified_since.notes: If-Unmodified-Since is evaluated against Last-Modified when present.

response_304.notes: The conditional engine produces 304 Not Modified responses and strips the response body.

range.notes: Byte ranges, multipart byteranges, and 416 handling are implemented for package-owned response entity processing.

if_range.notes: If-Range is honored for both entity-tag and Last-Modified validators.

content_digest.notes: No Content-Digest field implementation was found.

repr_digest.notes: No Repr-Digest field implementation was found.

http_signatures.notes: No RFC 9421 HTTP Message Signatures implementation was found.

jose_signing.notes: No JOSE signing surface was found.

cose_signing.notes: No COSE signing surface was found.

missing_modules_or_capability_classes: HTTP cache key and cache-control / freshness subsystem
Content-Digest / Repr-Digest field generator and verifier
HTTP Message Signatures component and policy surface

rfc7232.notes: The package now has a conditional-request validator engine for ETag, If-Match / If-None-Match, If-Modified-Since / If-Unmodified-Since, and 304 / 412 semantics.
rfc7232.title: HTTP Conditional Requests

rfc7233.notes: The package now has byte-range, multipart byterange, If-Range, 206, 416, Content-Range, and Accept-Ranges semantics in the direct entity boundary.
rfc7233.title: HTTP Range Requests

rfc9110.notes: RFC 9110 remains a bounded package target for CONNECT semantics, trailer fields, and content coding; RFC 7232 / RFC 7233 are now separately targeted direct entity-semantic RFCs.
rfc9110.title: HTTP Semantics

rfc9111.notes: No cache / freshness / revalidation subsystem was found.
rfc9111.title: HTTP Caching

rfc9530.notes: No Content-Digest or Repr-Digest field generator / verifier was found.
rfc9530.title: Digest Fields

rfc9421.notes: No Signature-Input / Signature subsystem was found.
rfc9421.title: HTTP Message Signatures

rfc7515.notes: No JOSE signing surface is declared by the direct-server boundary.
rfc7515.title: JSON Web Signature (JWS)

rfc7516.notes: No JOSE encryption surface is declared by the direct-server boundary.
rfc7516.title: JSON Web Encryption (JWE)

rfc7519.notes: No JWT token model or validation surface is declared by the direct-server boundary.
rfc7519.title: JSON Web Token (JWT)

rfc8152.notes: No COSE envelope / signing surface was found.
rfc8152.title: CBOR Object Signing and Encryption (COSE)

rfc9052.notes: No COSE bis update surface was found.
rfc9052.title: CBOR Object Signing and Encryption (COSE): Structures and Process

notes: tigrcorn is certifiably fully RFC compliant under its declared authoritative certification boundary
that boundary now includes RFC 7232 and RFC 7233 as direct package-owned HTTP entity semantics at local_conformance
broader cache freshness, digest, signature, JOSE, and COSE surfaces remain outside the current direct-server certification boundary
